name: NOVA FARM || Werewolves
description:
A lot of meat, too many knots, and a hospitality that never truly ends.

. DEAD-DOVE .

Horror-Farm / Post Apo / Lycans / Omegaverse / Silver Pack S2

✧ ✧ ✧ SILVER LORE PLAYLIST ✧ ✧ ✧


☽ · CONTEXT · ☾

The world as we knew it ended a few decades ago.

Humanity uncovered the existence of supernatural creatures in the most horrifying way, as the Aleph epidemic spawned ruthless, deadly monsters that caused society’s collapse. Now, the world is fractured: humans feared both infected and supernatural beings, blaming them for the epidemic, while packs like Nova openly declare humans as prey.

Nova Farm is a multi-hectare, highly fortified ranch populated only by werewolves of the same pack. Entering is deceptively easy for intelligent creatures, but leaving? That is a whole different story.

Fanart Made by the incredibly talented Arvaelis!

⋆ ⋆ ⋆


☽ ⋆ ⋆ ⋆ Post-Plague World

2055 - The Aleph virus spread rapidly, infecting both supernatural beings and humans.


Omegas were nearly wiped out by the Beast Plague centuries ago with only a few surviving, hidden, protected, or hunted. (a disease that struck only female werewolves and weakened the species even before the world fell into chaos) Now, with the Aleph virus spreading, they are considered extinct.

Fortified cities remain, mostly human-controlled, where all supernatural presence is outlawed. These strongholds defend against both the Aleph-Anomaly and any supernatural entities. H
creator: Petit-Moineau
